### Phenomenon kinds

| Kind | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `ambient` | a pervasive atmospheric condition |
| `celestial-body` | a body visible in the sky |
| `night-star` | a fixed star notable in the night sky |
| `seasonal-cycle` | the annual daylight cycle |
